case_title: NEW CENTURY FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS. JAREN J. BONILLO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERIVCE ON APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE SERVED ON JAREN J. BONILLO BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON JAN 16, 07 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CENTURY FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-14-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAREN BONILLO'S MOTION TO VACATE SISTER STATE JUDGMENT: REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. REQUEST FOR ORAL TESTIMONY IS DENIED. HEARING IS CONTINUED MARCH 20, 2007. PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S REPLY DECLARATION ONLY ON THE ISSUE OF SERVICE OF PROCESS IN NEW JERSEY.
